policy_name: Bajaj Allianz Extra Care Plus (Super Top-up)

min_entry_age.source_quote: age of 3 months and is not older than 80years of age at the commencement of the Policy Period.

max_entry_age.source_quote: age of 3 months and is not older than 80years of age at the commencement of the Policy Period.

max_renewal_age.source_quote: Renewal terms permit continuation; max renewal age not specified explicitly in wording

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured selectable with Aggregate Deductible options (super top-up structure); option list specified in Policy Schedule

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 3. 30-day waiting period (Excl03) a. Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first Policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 1. Pre-existing Diseases waiting period (Excl01) a. Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 12 months

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 2. Specified disease/procedure waiting period- (Excl02) a. Expenses related to the treatment of the listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 12 months

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Any treatment arising from or traceable to pregnancy ... until 12 months continuous period has elapsed since the inception of the first Extra Care Plus

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: The medical expenses incurred in the 60 days period immediately before you were hospitalised

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: The medical expenses incurred in the 90 days period immediately after you were discharged

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Treatment (defined per IRDAI; covered under hospitalization cover)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Day Care Centre / AYUSH Hospital defined (AYUSH In-patient hospitalization covered)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 2. Maternity Expenses ... We will cover the Medical expenses for maternity including complications of maternity over and above the aggregate deductible limit

newborn_coverage.source_quote: 2. Any Medical Expenses of the new born baby (excluded)

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses are covered under the policy (donor's hospitalization expenses for organ harvesting)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Reference to 'No Claim Bonus' carry-over on renewal exists; explicit base NCB % for Extra Care Plus super-top-up varies by variant (not stated as fixed % in wording)

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Restoration benefit not a base feature of Extra Care Plus super top-up (typical for top-up products)

room_rent_capping.value: No specific room rent capping in base (subject to Policy Schedule)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Reasonable and Customary Medical Expenses ... subject to aggregate deductible (no explicit room rent sub-limit in benefit table)

copayment_pct.source_quote: Co-payment ... A co-payment does not reduce the Sum Insured. (Defined but no mandatory base copay in Extra Care Plus)

deductible_amount.source_quote: Aggregate deductible is a cost sharing requirement under this policy that provides the company will not be liable for a specified rupee amount

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (Bajaj Allianz advertises 7,500+ network hospitals)

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility ... extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured (defined and operational)

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT not specified in policy wording; governed by IRDAI Master Circular

policy_type.source_quote: Aggregate deductible ... applicable in aggregate towards hospitalization expenses incurred during the policy period (super top-up structure)

_meta.notes: Super top-up product; SI options and deductibles configured per Policy Schedule. CSR + network count are insurer-level.
